title: Senior Investment Banker at HDFC Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at HDFC Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with HDFC Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About HDFC Bank:
HDFC Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Bank!
